checks: recompute every authority_canonical_hash with that field omitted
sort authority references by authority_id and recompute issued_authority_set_hash
require relational authority project_id and root_permit_id to equal the signed root scope
require every required_authority_id to be present in issued_authorities and absent from excluded_authorities
require no authority identifier to appear more than once or in both issued and excluded sets
non_claims: does not independently replay Policy correctness
does not establish dispatch, provider outcome, job completion, or settlement

verdicts.supported: the signed manifest and supplied authority population are internally consistent and match
verdicts.disproved: supplied signed or relational material conflicts or a canonical/set hash mismatches
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: required root, authority, signature, or population evidence is absent
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: a work-package, authority, comparator, or canonicalization version is unsupported
